evidence_span_text: AP-PLGA-NPs were successfully prepared with a mean particle size of 145.0 nm and a zeta potential of −14.81 mV. The in-vitro release of AP from the PLGA-NPs showed a biphasic release proﬁle. AP was metabolized into PUE in rats. The AUC0−∞values of AP and PUE for AP-PLGA-NPs were 2.90- and 2.29- fold as great as those for AP solution, respectively. The values of the relative target- ing efﬁciency in the brain were 2.40 and 2.58 for AP and PU
